name: Milk Chocolate Chewy Caramel 150g
description:
Treat yourself to the smooth and creamy goodness of Milk Chocolate Chewy Caramel 150g, available now at Sweets World! This delightful treat is a perfect mix of rich milk chocolate and soft, chewy caramel that melts in your mouth and leaves you wanting more.

Each piece in the Milk Chocolate Chewy Caramel 150g pack is carefully made to deliver just the right balance of sweetness and texture. The smooth milk chocolate coating wraps around a golden, gooey caramel centre, creating a satisfying bite every time. It's a classic combination that’s loved by both kids and adults.

Perfect for sharing with family and friends, adding to a candy bowl, or keeping in your snack drawer for a quick indulgence, this 150g pack offers just the right amount for treating yourself or others. Whether you enjoy them as an after-dinner sweet, a movie-time snack, or a small gift, these chewy chocolates are sure to please.

If you're a fan of soft caramel and creamy chocolate, you’ll love the Milk Chocolate Chewy Caramel. Pick up a pack today from Sweets World and enjoy a timeless treat that never goes out of style!

Ingredients:

Glucose, Sugar, Soft Icing Sugar, Sweet Condensed Milk,  Flour, Vegetable Oil, Water, Flavours, Gelatine, Salt, GMS(471).
